category_sources: Official ECMWF GitHub organization describes ecflow as ECMWF's workflow manager.
source_facts.description says ecflow-ui is a user interface for a client/server workflow package.
display_name_sources: Official ECMWF Confluence page is titled ecFlowUI Documentation.
docs_sources: Official ECMWF Confluence provides an ecFlowUI Documentation page.
source_facts.homepage is the official ecFlow Read the Docs documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; Read the Docs project metadata and ECMWF GitHub both identify https://github.com/ecmwf/ecflow as the repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a UI for a client/server workflow package.
source_facts.homepage points to official ecFlow documentation.
